---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug in HASEB
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Environment
- **OS**: [e.g. Ubuntu 20.04, macOS Monterey]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 18.17.0, 20.5.0]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 114, Firefox 115]
- **HASEB Version**: [e.g. 1.0.0, main branch]

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🔧 Possible Solution
If you have ideas on how to fix this, please describe them.

## 🏷️ Labels
- [ ] high priority
- [ ] low priority
- [ ] needs discussion
- [ ] good first issue
